rationale: Educ. Code §48.2541 addresses state aid for tax refunds under Tax Code §26.1115(c), not homestead exemptions under §11.13(b). No direct conflict; proposed change does not require amendment to this rule.
quote: a school district, including a school district that is otherwise ineligible for state aid under this chapter, is entitled to state aid in an amount equal to the amount of all tax refunds provided under Section 26.1115(c), Tax Code.
_note: Rule concerns tax refunds under Tax Code §26.1115(c), a distinct mechanism from the §11.13(b) homestead exemption. Indirect fiscal effects possible but no direct statutory conflict.
